gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T1.id) FROM cards AS T1 INNER JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T2.uuid = T1.uuid WHERE T1.rarity = 'rare' AND T1.types = 'Enchantment' AND T1.name = 'Abundance' AND T2.status = 'Legal'
pred_sql:
SELECT COUNT(T1.id)
FROM cards AS T1
LEFT JOIN legalities AS T2 ON T1.uuid = T2.uuid
WHERE T1.rarity = 'rare'
  AND T1.types = 'Enchantment'
  AND T1.name = 'Abundance'
  AND T2.status = 'Legal'
  AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM legalities AS T3
    WHERE T3.uuid = T1.uuid
      AND T3.status != 'Legal'
  )
question: How many rare enchantment Abundance cards are there whose play format status are all legal?
